LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS DAVID ACHTERKIRCHEN, JANE ACHTERKIRCHEN, GENNA TRICARICO, BLAKE MUELLER, CHRIS PADULA AND MATTEO FABIANO'S PETITION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION AND FOR APPOINTMENT OF NEUTRAL ARBITRATOR - PETITION COMPELLING ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PARTIES SHALL ATTEMPT TO AGREE ON AN ARBITRATOR. IF THEY CANNOT, THEY MAY APPLY TO THE COURT FOR APPOINTMENT OF A NEUTRAL ARBITRATOR PURSUANT TO CCP 1281.6. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR # 4761

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For An Order Compelling Arbitration And For Appointment Of Neutral Arbitrator; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. TRACIE A. KLEIN OF THE LAW OFFICES OF STEVEN H. HERMAN, TEL. NO. 982-6800 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS DAVID ACHTERKIRCHEN, JANE ACHTERKIRCHEN, GENNA TRICARICO, BLAKE MUELLER, CHRIS PADULA AND MATTEO FABIANO'S Petition For An Order Compelling Arbitration And For Appointment Of Neutral Arbitrator - Petition compelling arbitration is granted. No opposition filed. Parties shall attempt to agree on an arbitrator. If they cannot, they may apply to the Court for appointment of a neutral arbitrator pursuant to CCP 1281.6. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR # 4761 = (302/MJM)
